name: remediation
description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
sprintGoal: GGE G5 passes in orient: manifest always has at least one pending increment so the plan ceremony never stalls.

stories.title: ANDON: Restore broken GGE — Planning pipeline always has a pending increment to execute
stories.description:
Golden Goose Egg G5 indicator is failing. Indicator type: gate_passing. Restore it immediately. Rationale: The plan ceremony cannot run without a pending increment in manifest.json. When all increments complete, the machine stalls silently — no error, no alert, just nothing to plan. This egg catches that stall state immediately. First triggered when increment 9 completed with no successor increment defined.

Fix: Add at least one entry to prd/manifest.json increments[] with status=="pending". These should be meaningful future increments (e.g. the next theme or kaizen sprint), not placeholder entries. Use the theme-review ceremony output or backlog priorities to determine appropriate future increment names.
acceptanceCriteria: GGE G5 indicator passes in orient
stories.testPlan:
Run: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); pending=[i for i in m.get('increments',[]) if i.get('status')=='pending']; assert len(pending)>=1, f'No pending increments — GGE G5 still failing'; print(f'{len(pending)} pending increment(s) — GGE G5 OK')"
Expected output: '1 pending increment(s) — GGE G5 OK' (or more).

smart.notes: Specific score 3: the story does not name which file to modify or what exact change to make. The test plan implies adding an increment with status=pending to prd/manifest.json, but this must be inferred — no file path, field name, or example diff is provided.

stories.readinessNote: Priority-0 ANDON — included despite SMART gap. Fix: add pending increments to prd/manifest.json. branchName updated to feature/ prefix to satisfy schema. testPlan added at planning.
